adjusted.reasoning: France clear favourites but market (~60%) sits far below the model's 86% and the market track has out-predicted the Elo model all tournament — anchored to de-vigged consensus (FRA 60/24/16). France have won all 6, scoring 17, and edged Paraguay in R16; Mbappe on 7 goals wears the armband. Trimmed vs a genuinely dangerous Morocco (held Brazil, knocked out the Netherlands, 2022 semi-finalists) — the best underdog left. Tchouameni doubtful (thigh/abductor, late call) and Olise's booking is under FFF appeal, minor negatives already in the market number. Morocco miss Saibari (hamstring doubt); Hakimi fit. Slight lean to model on France's form keeps p_home a hair above market.

factors.factor: Tchouameni doubtful (thigh/abductor, late call); Olise yellow under FFF appeal; Mbappe (7 goals) captains
